Home Process
How We Work

A clear path, start to launch.

Six steps. You always know what's happening, what's next, and what you're signing off — no surprises, no scope creep on your end.

  1. 01
    Step 01 · Understand

    Discovery

    We learn your business, goals, audience, and constraints — and define what success actually looks like. This is a conversation, not a sales call. We map the problem before touching the solution.

    Goals workshopAudit of current setupSuccess metrics
  2. 02
    Step 02 · Scope

    Planning

    A fixed scope, timeline, and architecture you sign off before a line of code is written. You see exactly what's being built, in what order, and what it costs. No hourly surprises.

    Fixed-scope proposalSitemap / flowTimeline
  3. 03
    Step 03 · Shape

    Design

    Layouts and systems designed around outcomes — not trends. We work in rounds so the design sharpens with your input before development begins. Mobile, accessibility, and performance are considered from the first wireframe.

    WireframesVisual designDesign system
  4. 04
    Step 04 · Build

    Development

    Hand-coded, tested, and reviewed against the standard. No page builders, no shortcuts. Clean, documented code that loads fast and is easy for anyone to maintain later.

    Hand-coded buildCross-browser QAPerformance pass
  5. 05
    Step 05 · Connect

    Automation

    Workflows are built, monitored, and documented so you understand exactly what runs, when, and why. Every node is testable, and nothing goes live without a dry run against real data.

    Workflow buildMonitoringDocumentation
  6. 06
    Step 06 · Ship

    Launch

    Shipped, verified, and supported. We stay close after go-live to handle edge cases and make sure the systems you depend on keep running.

    Go-live checklistHandoverOngoing support

Step one is a conversation.

Book a discovery call and we'll map the path from where you are to where you want to be.

Book a Free Call →
